message:
Command `# GRT extra iterations 12/50. Previous GRT completed at ~50 iterations.
# At ~2 iter/min, ~38 more iterations = ~19 more min for GRT.
# Then antenna repair + DRT. Monitor with 5-min polls.

WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
LOG="/tmp/librelane_final.log"
LR_PID=718885

for i in $(seq 1 300); do
  sleep 300

  LR_ALIVE=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o pid --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  ELAPSED=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o etime --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  STEP=$(ls -t "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep "^[0-9]" | head -1)
  STEP_COUNT=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep -c "^[0-9]" || echo 0)
  LOG_BYTES=$(stat -c%s "$LOG" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  FINAL_GDS=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/gds/"*.gds 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  FINAL_LEF=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/lef/"*.lef 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  GRT_ITER=$(grep "GRT-0102" "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | tail -1 | xargs | head -c 60)
  ANTENNA=$(grep "GRT-0012\|GRT-0302\|antenna\|diode" "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | tail -1 | xargs | head -c 60)
  DRT=$(grep "DRT-\|detailed.*route\|DRT-0302\|DRT-00" "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | tail -1 | xargs | head -c 60)
  LOG_TAIL=$(tail -1 "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | xargs | cut -c1-80)

  echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] LR=${LR_ALIVE:-DONE}(${ELAPSED}) step=$STEP (#${STEP_COUNT}) log=$(numfmt --to=iec $LOG_BYTES 2>/dev/null)"
  [ -n "$GRT_ITER" ] && echo "  GRT: $GRT_ITER"
  [ -n "$ANTENNA" ] && echo "  ANT: $ANTENNA"
  [ -n "$DRT" ] && echo "  DRT: $DRT"
  echo "  $LOG_TAIL"
  [ -n "$FINAL_GDS" ] && echo "  *** GDS: $FINAL_GDS ***"
  [ -n "$FINAL_LEF" ] && echo "  *** LEF: $FINAL_LEF ***"
  echo ""

  if [ -z "$LR_ALIVE" ]; then
    echo "=== LibreLane EXITED ==="
    ls -lt "$WRAPPER_RUN/" | head -60
    find "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/" 2>/dev/null | sort | head -40
    tail -80 "$LOG"
    break
  fi
done` executed with exit code -1.

function.arguments:
{"command": "# GRT extra iterations 12/50. Previous GRT completed at ~50 iterations.
# At ~2 iter/min, ~38 more iterations = ~19 more min for GRT.
# Then antenna repair + DRT. Monitor with 5-min polls.

WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
LOG="/tmp/librelane_final.log"
LR_PID=718885

for i in $(seq 1 300); do
  sleep 300

  LR_ALIVE=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o pid --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  ELAPSED=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o etime --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  STEP=$(ls -t "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep "^[0-9]" | head -1)
  STEP_COUNT=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep -c "^[0-9]" || echo 0)
  LOG_BYTES=$(stat -c%s "$LOG" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  FINAL_GDS=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/gds/"*.gds 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  FINAL_LEF=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/lef/"*.lef 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  GRT_ITER=$(grep "GRT-0102" "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | tail -1 | xargs | head -c 60)
  ANTENNA=$(grep "GRT-0012\|GRT-0302\|antenna\|diode" "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | tail -1 | xargs | head -c 60)
  DRT=$(grep "DRT-\|detailed.*route\|DRT-0302\|DRT-00" "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | tail -1 | xargs | head -c 60)
  LOG_TAIL=$(tail -1 "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | xargs | cut -c1-80)

  echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] LR=${LR_ALIVE:-DONE}(${ELAPSED}) step=$STEP (#${STEP_COUNT}) log=$(numfmt --to=iec $LOG_BYTES 2>/dev/null)"
  [ -n "$GRT_ITER" ] && echo "  GRT: $GRT_ITER"
  [ -n "$ANTENNA" ] && echo "  ANT: $ANTENNA"
  [ -n "$DRT" ] && echo "  DRT: $DRT"
  echo "  $LOG_TAIL"
  [ -n "$FINAL_GDS" ] && echo "  *** GDS: $FINAL_GDS ***"
  [ -n "$FINAL_LEF" ] && echo "  *** LEF: $FINAL_LEF ***"
  echo ""

  if [ -z "$LR_ALIVE" ]; then
    echo "=== LibreLane EXITED ==="
    ls -lt "$WRAPPER_RUN/" | head -60
    find "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/" 2>/dev/null | sort | head -40
    tail -80 "$LOG"
    break
  fi
done", "timeout": 86400}
function.name: execute_bash

content:
Command: "# GRT extra iterations 12/50. Previous GRT completed at ~50 iterations.
# At ~2 iter/min, ~38 more iterations = ~19 more min for GRT.
# Then antenna repair + DRT. Monitor with 5-min polls.

WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
LOG="/tmp/librelane_final.log"
LR_PID=718885

for i in $(seq 1 300); do
  sleep 300

  LR_ALIVE=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o pid --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  ELAPSED=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o etime --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  STEP=$(ls -t "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep "^[0-9]" | head -1)
  STEP_COUNT=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep -c "^[0-9]" || echo 0)
  LOG_BYTES=$(stat -c%s "$LOG" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  FINAL_GDS=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/gds/"*.gds 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  FINAL_LEF=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/lef/"*.lef 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  GRT_ITER=$(grep "GRT-0102" "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | tail -1 | xargs | head -c 60)
  ANTENNA=$(grep "GRT-0012\|GRT-0302\|antenna\|diode" "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | tail -1 | xargs | head -c 60)
  DRT=$(grep "DRT-\|detailed.*route\|DRT-0302\|DRT-00" "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | tail -1 | xargs | head -c 60)
  LOG_TAIL=$(tail -1 "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | xargs | cut -c1-80)

  echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] LR=${LR_ALIVE:-DONE}(${ELAPSED}) step=$STEP (#${STEP_COUNT}) log=$(numfmt --to=iec $LOG_BYTES 2>/dev/null)"
  [ -n "$GRT_ITER" ] && echo "  GRT: $GRT_ITER"
  [ -n "$ANTENNA" ] && echo "  ANT: $ANTENNA"
  [ -n "$DRT" ] && echo "  DRT: $DRT"
  echo "  $LOG_TAIL"
  [ -n "$FINAL_GDS" ] && echo "  *** GDS: $FINAL_GDS ***"
  [ -n "$FINAL_LEF" ] && echo "  *** LEF: $FINAL_LEF ***"
  echo ""

  if [ -z "$LR_ALIVE" ]; then
    echo "=== LibreLane EXITED ==="
    ls -lt "$WRAPPER_RUN/" | head -60
    find "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/" 2>/dev/null | sort | head -40
    tail -80 "$LOG"
    break
  fi
done" timed out
